title: Salmonberry Addition
description: Addon for mods Regions Unexplored & Farmer's Delight
body:
![Salmonberries Juice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f08b48a726724108ce0fea4bee3bd0d9414ada8.png)This modification is an addition to such mods as: [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored) and [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight).

These are mainly products made from salmon berries that are in fashion Regions Unexplored. The reason why I made this mod is the lack of crafting with this berry anywhere.

I don't plan to develop this mod much as I did it for myself, but if at least someone downloads it, I will only be grateful!
